meta.title: DeepSeek v4 Pro Phase-by-Phase Implementation Plan for Receipt Invoice Generator
meta.model_availability_note: Verify against official DeepSeek API docs before execution; do not assume model availability if API list changes.
meta.purpose: Prompt/contract for DeepSeek v4 Pro to implement the system phase by phase with mandatory gates, tests, smoke checks, and stop conditions.

deepseek_runtime_instruction.role: Act as a careful implementation agent. Implement only the current phase. Do not continue to the next phase until all required tests, smoke checks, and gates pass.
deepseek_runtime_instruction.language: Use English for code and technical identifiers. User-facing Malay/English labels must follow template requirements.
must_do_before_each_phase: State planned files/modules for the phase
Run relevant tests before declaring phase complete
must_not_do: Do not import historical Excel records as production data
Do not mix company templates or numbering
Do not allocate official number during draft
Do not implement full MyInvois submission in v1
Do not let AI or Telegram issue without confirmation
Do not mutate issued PDFs or issued snapshots silently
deepseek_runtime_instruction.phase_progress_rule: If any required test fails, fix within current phase and rerun. If blocker remains, stop and report; do not proceed.

historical_excel_policy.source_exact: Template reference only, not imported as production records.
historical_excel_policy.user_intent: Excel lama reference only, bukan import production.
historical_excel_policy.implementation_guardrail: No old workbook row, document number, customer, item, or total becomes live production data unless the user later starts a separate import project.

document_design_policy.source_exact: Match plus kemas: preserve original design identity while improving spacing, typos, table consistency, and polish.
document_design_policy.implementation_guardrail: Templates should visually follow the supplied company formats, but cleanup spacing, typo-level text, wrapping, alignment, table consistency, and professional polish.

company_isolation.source_exact: Every company has separate profile, templates, records, numbering, and sequences.
company_isolation.implementation_guardrail: All database queries, renderers, API calls, Telegram flows, and sequence counters must be scoped by company_id.

numbering_issue_rule.source_exact: Official numbers are generated only when a document is issued, not while it is a draft.
numbering_issue_rule.implementation_guardrail: Draft documents use internal draft IDs only; final invoice/quotation/receipt/DO numbers are allocated transactionally at issue time.

einvoice_v1_scope.source_exact: Metadata-ready only. MyInvois submission/signing/cancel/reject is not part of v1.
einvoice_v1_scope.implementation_guardrail: Store future MyInvois fields and validation readiness, but do not build official submission, digital signing, cancel, reject, or reconciliation in v1.

no_cross_company_numbering.source_exact: Wehdah, Persada, Virtue Damsel, and Nas Ceria numbering must never share one sequence.
no_cross_company_numbering.user_intent: Jangan campur numbering Wehdah, Persada, Virtue Damsel, Nas Ceria.
no_cross_company_numbering.implementation_guardrail: Sequence scope must be company_id + document_type + year, with optional branch/project extension later.

workspace_state.source_exact: Current workspace is empty, so build a new system rather than refactor an existing app.
workspace_state.user_intent: Workspace asal kosong, bina sistem baru.
workspace_state.implementation_guardrail: Future implementation should scaffold a new application and treat handoff folders as planning/reference material.

required_reference_files.audit_note: 8 sheets; NAS Ceria/Vertex42 style; Arial; quotation/invoice examples; item columns No, Item/Description, Qty, Rate, Amount.

required_reference_files.document_family: NAS Ceria quote/invoice with project sheets
required_reference_files.audit_note: 20 sheets; visible and hidden sheets; quotes/invoices mixed with inventory/costing sheets for Masjid Muadz/Muaz project.
18 sheets; Wehdah Lao UI/Rockwell template family; many artwork pages; A4 invoice plus artwork confirmation layouts.
15 sheets; same Wehdah template family; ARTWORK sheet with invoice and artwork continuation pages.
16 sheets; Wehdah templates; includes recent artwork examples I-241207 and I-250110.
2 artwork sheets; Wehdah invoice layout with dense embedded artwork images.

required_reference_files.document_family: Wehdah quotation/invoice plus blank billing templates
required_reference_files.audit_note: 16 sheets; active Wehdah MUBZ quotation/invoice examples plus A To Z blank templates for DO, cash bill, PO, notes, receipt, voucher.

required_reference_files.document_family: Wehdah quotation/invoice plus blank billing templates duplicate/reference
required_reference_files.audit_note: 16 sheets; parsed structure matches QUOTATION MUBZ (1); keep as supplied reference for comparison.

required_reference_files.document_family: Wehdah issued invoice PDF with artwork page
required_reference_files.audit_note: 2 pages; page 1 invoice, page 2 artwork page; page size 1020x1320 pt; exact PDF output target for artwork attachment workflow.

required_reference_files.document_family: Persada workbook with mixed template sheets
required_reference_files.audit_note: 13 sheets; canonical Persada billing sheet is INV 1; other sheets contain A To Z, Virtue, or Wehdah data and must not be treated as Persada canonical.
PNG transparent stamp/chop; 294x296; blue company stamp with registration number.
A4 letterhead background; 4963x7019; header logo/contact block, gradient bar, footer steps.
JPG logo; 1048x408; navy/blue and green mark with uppercase wordmark.

source_reference_pack.heuristic_warning: All workbook detected_* fields are audit heuristics only. Never treat them as canonical master data or sequence truth.

canonical_source_registry.purpose: Machine-readable allowlist so mixed workbook sheets cannot leak into company identity, template, or numbering seeds.
canonical_source_registry.global_rule: Only canonical_for_render entries may drive v1 template implementation. non_canonical_reference_only may inform structure. deny_for_seeding must never seed live company data, templates, or sequences.

canonical_for_render.notes: Use only sheets with Wehdah identity and real invoice/quotation layout.
Strongest output reference for Wehdah invoice plus artwork behavior.

non_canonical_reference_only.notes: A To Z generic structures inside Wehdah workbooks; usable only as generic document structure references.

deny_for_seeding: Any old document number, customer, item, total, payment, or historical row from the Excel files

canonical_for_render.notes: NAS Ceria Vertex42/Arial quote and invoice visual family.
Use only after sheet-by-sheet classification; workbook is mixed.

non_canonical_reference_only.notes: Costing, inventory, hidden, or Virtue partial sheets; not customer-facing NAS templates.

deny_for_seeding: Bare historical numbers such as 3118, 2291, 1292, 3893, 4316 as production sequence truth

canonical_for_render.notes: Only canonical Persada billing sheet in the workbook.
Use assets for Persada identity; letterhead is formal-doc background unless user confirms billing usage.

non_canonical_reference_only.notes: Mixed A To Z, Virtue, and Wehdah sheets; not Persada canonical.

deny_for_seeding: Persada workbook sheets other than INV 1 for Persada company identity
Historical invoice no 202601030025 as production sequence truth

non_canonical_reference_only.notes: Partial mixed references only; not enough for final v1 tenant/template rollout.

deny_for_seeding: Any final Virtue template, bank, tax, or numbering seed until user confirms active v1 inclusion and supplies missing assets

non_canonical_reference_only.notes: Reusable generic structure only. Not a real company unless user later confirms.

deny_for_seeding: Company profile seeding as an actual tenant

global_non_negotiable_guardrails: Historical Excel files are reference templates only.
Design target is match + kemas, preserving company identity while improving layout discipline.
Every company has isolated profile, template, records, numbering, and sequences.
Official numbers only allocate at issue time inside a transaction.
No cross-company numbering, branding, assets, or PDF cache leakage.
Issued PDFs and issued snapshots are immutable.
Phase gate tests must pass before proceeding.

must_clean: do not use costing sheets as templates

Virtue Damsel Solution.status: placeholder until user confirms active v1 scope and supplies canonical assets

A To Z Account.status: generic reference only, never seed as real company by default

renamed_internal_type.reason: Avoid ambiguity with 60mm quick-print receipt output.

document_type_contract.thermal_receipt: Print layout/artifact for official receipt or cash bill, not automatically a separate legal document.

amount_in_words_contract.purpose: Optional display of total amount in words on invoice, quotation, official receipt, and other amount-bearing documents.

fields_and_config.documents.amount_in_words_text_snapshot: text generated and stored at issue time

default_malay_myr_example.words: RINGGIT MALAYSIA SATU JUTA DUA RATUS TIGA PULUH EMPAT RIBU LIMA RATUS ENAM PULUH TUJUH DAN LAPAN PULUH SEMBILAN SEN

rules: Generate words from exact numeric grand_total after rounding rules are applied.
Never let amount-in-words disagree with numeric total.
If sen is 00, use template configured style: SAHAJA or DAN SIFAR SEN.
Negative amount words are allowed only for credit/debit/refund-style documents with explicit sign policy.
Currency wording must be configurable for non-MYR future support.
Generated words are snapshotted at issue time so future wording rule changes do not mutate issued documents.
Draft preview may regenerate, but issue snapshot freezes the text.

template_placement.Wehdah Solution: Near existing RM: amount-in-words section before or near Grand Total.
template_placement.Nas Ceria Services: Near total quote/invoice footer, outside the item table.
template_placement.Persada Gemilang Global: Near grand total/payment section matching INV 1 layout.
template_placement.official_receipt: Near amount/received total where space permits.
template_placement.thermal_receipt: Optional and default hidden because 60mm width is constrained.

required_tests: numeric total equals generated words source
snapshot unchanged after template wording setting changes

multipage_pdf_contract.purpose: Ensure invoice, quotation, DO, receipt, and related PDFs remain professional when item lists or descriptions require additional pages.
rules: A4 item tables must support multiple pages.
Repeat item table header on every continuation page.
Keep each item row together where possible; long descriptions wrap cleanly.
Totals, amount-in-words, bank details, terms, and signature/chop appear only on final main document page.
Footer/signature/chop must never overlap item rows.
Page numbering is recommended as Page X of Y and may be template-controlled.
Long customer addresses and project descriptions wrap without pushing metadata into item table.
If the document is a DO and template says prices are hidden, continuation pages must preserve hidden-price layout.
Wehdah main invoice/quotation pages must come before artwork pages by default.
Artwork pages append after all main document pages.

template_specific_rules.Wehdah Solution: Repeat item header on continuation pages; keep dark blue header identity; amount-in-words and grand total only on final main page; artwork pages after main document.
template_specific_rules.Nas Ceria Services: Preserve compact Vertex42/Arial table proportions; remove spreadsheet junk; wrap long masjid/project text cleanly.
template_specific_rules.Persada Gemilang Global: Use Persada brand header and stamp/signature final block; respect INV 1 layout and final-page totals.
template_specific_rules.A To Z generic: Use only generic document structures for DO, PO, notes, official receipt, and payment voucher; do not seed company identity.

required_tests: long item description across several lines
multi-page invoice with amount-in-words on final page only
multi-page quotation with validity/payment terms retained
artwork pages append after all main pages
visual regression for Wehdah, NAS, and Persada

numbering_contract.scope: company_id + document_type + issue_year + optional future dimensions
numbering_contract.issue_allocation: Use row lock/transaction on sequence counter for company/document/year.
numbering_contract.preview_rule: Format example only; no reservation and no promise of actual next sequence.

issue_time_snapshot_contract.immutability_rule: Issued snapshots must be used for issued views/exports and must not change when live profiles are edited later.

schema_and_api_contract.status: Proposed contract for implementation. DeepSeek must adapt to actual framework conventions but preserve behavior.

pdf_endpoint.rule: Return immutable render version after authorization and company scope check.

pdf_rendering_contract.engine: Playwright/Browsershot Chromium unless implementation discovers a better compatible option and documents why.
font_controls: Ensure reference fonts or acceptable bundled fallbacks are installed in container
Run visual regression if fallback differs
pdf_rendering_contract.immutability: Final PDFs are stored in pdf_renders and not silently overwritten.

artwork_attachment_contract.default_order: main document pages first, artwork pages after for Wehdah
rules: preserve original
generate previews
captions Artwork 1..N
confirmation line
sign/chop area
fit without crop unless user chooses crop mode

telegram_deepseek_ai_contract.telegram_auth: stable chat_id/user_id allowlist, not username only

einvoice_metadata_contract.scope: metadata-ready only, no submission/signing/cancel/reject in v1
einvoice_metadata_contract.reverify_before_phase: Re-check official MyInvois SDK before Phase 6 implementation.

phase_execution_plan.name: Audit ingestion and canonical registry
phase_execution_plan.objective: Read all handoff packs, preserve locked decisions, and classify every reference source before coding.
required_tests: JSON parse all handoff JSON files
canonical registry covers Wehdah, NAS, Persada, Virtue partial, A To Z generic
smoke_tests: Verify no historical Excel rows are marked production seed
Verify mixed sheets are non-canonical or deny-for-seeding
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: All canonical sources classified and locked decisions preserved exactly.
stop_conditions: unclear canonical source for a template needed in v1

phase_execution_plan.name: Missing info and v1 scope freeze
phase_execution_plan.objective: Freeze decisions that affect scaffold, schema, numbering, and template work.
allowed_work_scope: no app scaffold until gate passes
required_tests: numbering policies exist for each confirmed company and document type
amount-in-words behavior defined per template family or deferred explicitly
pagination behavior defined for item-heavy docs
smoke_tests: Confirm Virtue Damsel is active/in-scope or placeholder-only
Confirm Persada canonical identity pending items are tracked
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: Phase 1/2 blockers resolved or explicitly deferred with editable placeholders.
stop_conditions: final numbering cannot be represented by policy model
official_receipt vs thermal receipt remains ambiguous

phase_execution_plan.name: Scaffold and infrastructure
phase_execution_plan.objective: Create the application foundation only after Phase 0.5 is closed.
smoke_tests: login locally
create two companies in seed/test fixture
verify scoped user cannot see other company placeholder data
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: No boot errors and no company scoping bypass.

phase_execution_plan.name: Master data and numbering
phase_execution_plan.objective: Implement company/customer/product/template metadata and collision-safe issue-time numbering.
required_tests: number preview does not reserve sequence
smoke_tests: configure WS and PGG different invoice policies
create drafts for both without official numbers
issue test fixture concurrently and verify uniqueness
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: No collision under concurrency and no official number allocated during draft.
stop_conditions: actual next number exposed as reservation
manual override can mutate issued number

phase_execution_plan.name: Document workflow engine
phase_execution_plan.objective: Implement lifecycle, official_receipt, payments, allocations, snapshots, and immutable issued state.
required_tests: issued snapshots unchanged after profile edit
smoke_tests: create quotation
convert to invoice
record partial payment
generate official receipt allocation
edit company profile and verify issued snapshot unchanged
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: Workflow tests pass and issued structured data is immutable.

phase_execution_plan.name: PDF templates, pagination, amount-in-words, artwork, thermal
phase_execution_plan.objective: Implement reference-aligned PDFs with multi-page layout, optional amount-in-words, artwork pages, and 60mm thermal layout.
required_tests: amount words snapshot unchanged after template setting edit
artwork pages after all main pages
smoke_tests: render Wehdah invoice with artwork
render NAS quotation with long masjid address
render Persada invoice with stamp
render multi-page invoice with amount-in-words only on final page
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: Visual/PDF checks pass and design follows canonical references closely without overlap or brand leaks.
stop_conditions: PDF design cannot match references closely enough
artwork appears before main Wehdah invoice pages

phase_execution_plan.name: API, Telegram, and DeepSeek AI
phase_execution_plan.objective: Expose safe APIs and AI-assisted drafting without allowing AI or Telegram to issue documents unsafely.
deliverables: issue endpoint requiring Idempotency-Key and draft_hash
required_tests: DeepSeek outage fallback to manual draft
smoke_tests: create draft from Telegram text
preview draft
confirm with valid token
repeat confirmation and verify no duplicate issue
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: AI/Telegram cannot issue without valid human confirmation, idempotency, and matching draft hash.
stop_conditions: AI chooses company or final number

phase_execution_plan.name: e-Invoice metadata readiness
phase_execution_plan.objective: Implement metadata readiness only, without MyInvois submission scope creep.
required_tests: refund/self-billed not exposed as v1 UI workflow
smoke_tests: issue invoice with metadata-ready fields
verify no external MyInvois API call is made
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: Metadata-ready behavior works without crossing into full submission.
stop_conditions: future-only docs appear in v1 UI workflow

phase_execution_plan.name: Security, backup, and Tencent production deploy
phase_execution_plan.objective: Deploy securely to Tencent Ubuntu with backups, monitoring, and production smoke evidence.
smoke_tests: full production issue flow for one test company
verify backup and log outputs
phase_execution_plan.gate_to_next_phase: Final phase; all smoke and restore verification pass.

amount_in_words: numeric total equals generated words source
snapshot unchanged after template wording setting changes
multipage_pdf: long item description across several lines
multi-page invoice with amount-in-words on final page only
multi-page quotation with validity/payment terms retained
artwork pages append after all main pages
visual regression for Wehdah, NAS, and Persada

stop_conditions: Test gate fails and cannot be resolved in current phase
Historical Excel data is imported as production data
PDF design cannot match reference closely enough
Official number is allocated during draft
Issued PDF or issued snapshots can be silently changed
e-Invoice scope drifts into full MyInvois submission
final_acceptance_criteria: All phases pass their gates in sequence
Multi-page PDFs do not overlap or lose final sections
Wehdah/NAS/Persada designs match approved references with match + kemas policy
Production smoke and backup restore pass
